emotional_tone: Intellectual, objective, serious, anti-vanity, museum-like focus

heading.style: Can mix italic and normal for editorial feel
heading.usage: Post titles, page headers, major section headers

monospace.usage: Metadata, pseudonyms, timestamps, tags, small UI labels, consensus indicators

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (dense vertical rhythm for feed)
layout_and_spacing.borders: Flat 1px borders (border-white/10), no bounding boxes/cards for posts, use border-b for separation
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left alignment for content to mimic editorial articles

post_feed.style: List format, border-b border-white/10, no elevated cards
post_feed.title: Instrument Serif text-2xl to text-4xl
post_feed.vote_buttons: Minimalist chevrons (lucide-react), NO vote counts visible. On voted: color turns accent (Amber)

tags.style: border border-accent/30 text-accent px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase rounded-none

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-black hover:bg-accent-hover font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-3 px-6 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-3 px-6 rounded-none
buttons.ghost: text-secondary-text hover:text-white font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-widest

modals.style: Solid background (oklch(15% 0.01 250)), hard borders (border-white/10), no soft shadows, backdrop-blur-sm on overlay. Used for Steelman modal.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Text color shifts, border opacities increase. Avoid heavy background color shifts.

hero_background.description: Minimalist dark abstract background for landing or auth page
hero_background.usage: Use with heavy opacity overlay (bg-background/90) to ensure text legibility. Place at the top of the home feed as a subtle hero.

instructions_to_main_agent: The user explicitly wants to 'Turn this into Next.js 15 App Router' but the current workspace uses Vite. You MUST perform the Next.js migration as requested, or integrate these Next.js/React patterns seamlessly.
Import fonts: 'Instrument Serif', 'DM Sans', 'DM Mono' from Google Fonts into the main layout.
Install 'lucide-react' for all icons. Do not use emojis.
Apply 'dark' theme globally. The background must be the dark cool-neutral oklch value.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='upvote-button').
NEVER display vote counts. The UI should only show up/down arrows (or whatever mechanism) that light up amber when activated.
Use Shadcn UI primitives but heavily customize them. Strip out rounded corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) and soft shadows.
Steelman modal: Dialog should appear before submitting a negative reply, prompting the user to restate the opposing argument.
Do not build 'Cards' for posts. Use a continuous list with horizontal 1px separator lines.
Ensure the Amber accent is used sparingly to draw focus to consensus gates, stub badges, and active actions.
